calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-16-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Mary McLain; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Plaintiff Nasir Patel present in pro per.

Hope L. Greenhill, Esq., representing the defendant Michael McDonald through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

Per Settlement Conference Memo by JPT McLain: Case settled pursuant to "Stipulated Settlement"
Trial date vacated.
